daily.today_energy: The sun's hitting different today, Leo. You're radiating that main character energy but with a softer touch—people are genuinely drawn to your authenticity rather than just the spectacle. Lean into it.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, a real conversation is waiting to happen—the kind that actually matters. Single? Someone's been noticing you for a while. Your vulnerability is your superpower today, not your confidence.
daily.career: Ideas are flowing but don't just pitch yet. Sit with them a bit longer. There's a collaboration brewing that could actually change things. Your instinct about who to trust is sharp right now, trust it.
daily.health: Your body's asking for rest, not hustle. That burnout energy is real. A slow day—maybe some stretching, time outside, whatever grounds you—beats any gym session. Listen to what you actually need.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about recalibrating, Leo. Mercury's moving in a way that's making you think twice about stuff you've been ignoring. Trust your gut—it's actually onto something real. Growth is messy, but you're handling it.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your love language right now. Stop performing. The person worth your time will vibe with the real you, chaos and all. If you're in something, a vulnerable convo could hit different this week.
weekly.career: Your professional radar is sharp. Someone's about to notice your work, or you'll finally see an opportunity you've been waiting for. Don't minimize your contributions—you've earned the spotlight. Trust the momentum building behind the scenes.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for rest and intentionality. Whether that's actual sleep, touching grass, or ditching your phone for a bit—listen. Burnout's creeping, but you have time to course correct. Move your body in ways that feel good, not punishing.
